name: FSK Rating Updater
description: Standardizes age ratings to the German FSK format (FSK-0/6/12/16/18) and fills in missing or foreign ratings using official German certifications from TMDb.
overview: German FSK age ratings for the whole library.

versions.changelog: Fixed: the FSK overlay now registers correctly with the File Transformation plugin. Previously registration failed with a Newtonsoft.Json type-identity error and silently fell back to middleware injection.
New: optional fallback to a foreign numeric age rating from TMDb (e.g. Russian/Nordic "12+") when no German certification exists, and a 'Test API key' button in the settings.
Age-gate ratings like "12+" or "16+" are now recognized and normalized to FSK-12 / FSK-16 (previously left unchanged).
You can now restrict the task to specific libraries in the plugin settings. When no libraries are selected, every library is processed as before.
The FSK overlay is smaller and now scales with the screen size (viewport-relative sizing with sensible min/max bounds).
Overlay injection now integrates with the File Transformation plugin when installed (like Intro Skipper); the request-time middleware remains as automatic fallback.
Overlay script is now injected at request time via middleware, so it also works when the web directory is read-only (Linux packages, Docker). No more writing to index.html.
Netflix-style FSK overlay: the web client now fades in the FSK badge for a few seconds when playback starts. Configurable (on/off, duration) in the plugin settings.
Seasons and episodes are now processed too: they use the series' German certification from TMDb and otherwise inherit the rating from their parent. New 'Also update seasons and episodes' setting.
Initial release: FSK normalization, TMDb German certification lookup, configurable fallback, dry-run mode.
